# Satpalsinh Rana

> Satpalsinh Rana is a Software Engineer based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India,
> specializing in building real-time systems, web applications, and
> cross-platform desktop applications with Angular, React, Next.js, Node.js,
> and Electron.js. This is his personal portfolio at https://www.satpal.cloud.

## About

- Name: Satpalsinh Rana
- Role: Software Engineer at Asite Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (since June 2023)
- Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- Education: B.E. in Information Technology, Government Engineering College, Modasa (2019–2023)
- Core skills: JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular, React.js, Next.js, RxJS, NgRx, Node.js, Express.js, Electron.js, MongoDB, SQLite
- Focus areas: real-time systems, WebSockets, event streaming, desktop application development, authentication/SSO
- Availability: open to collaboration and new projects

## Key pages

- [Portfolio home](https://www.satpal.cloud): overview, experience, skills, and contact
- [About](https://www.satpal.cloud/about): full biography and background
- [Projects](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects): full project catalog
- [Blog](https://blogs.satpal.cloud): articles on JavaScript internals, system design, and engineering

## Selected projects (case studies)

- [NextNews](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/nextnews): real-time news aggregation with AI summarization (Next.js, Groq, LLaMA)
- [Aura Auth](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/aura-auth): OIDC-compliant Single Sign-On authentication server (Node.js, OAuth 2.0, OIDC)
- [Lively](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/lively): real-time location tracking on Kafka event streams (React, Kafka, Bun, WebSockets)
- [Emitly](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/emitly): high-performance real-time WebSocket messaging platform (Node.js, WebSockets)
- [Ratio'd](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/ratiod): real-time polling platform (Next.js, React)
- [ChainMoj](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/chainmoj): full-stack movie ticket booking with live seat selection (React, Node.js, MongoDB)
- [Carpool](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/carpool): carpool matching with route visualization (AngularJS, Node.js, Leaflet)
- [Aetheria](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/aetheria): cosmic data visualization dashboard (React, Three.js, WebGL)
- [Tik-Tak](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/tiktak): Tic-Tac-Toe with game AI (React)
- [TSS](https://www.satpal.cloud/projects/tss): lightweight CSS utility framework published on npm
